description: Style NoteThese lifestyle canvas shoes from adidas are great for casual wear. They give superior traction and protection to the feet while remaining comfortable and stylish. Team these with jeans and tees for a great casual look.Product DetailsHeavy canvas uppers for snug Fit with central lace-upsMetallic lace eyelets for durabilityRubber toe box for enhanced protection to the forefoot and longer shoe lifePU midsole for added comfortDurable gum rubber outsole with circular lugs for superior gripAbrasion resistant foxing and toe-guard for additional protection and durabilityMaterial and CareCanvas, rubberDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
